skill1.note: Gate assumed always-satisfied at scope lock (boss damage unmodeled). Recon corroborates constant uptime solo. Documented in note but absent from the formal unmodeled[] array — minor tracking gap, not a silent drop.

skill1.kitLine: Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 14.08% of the skill user's ATK constantly
skill1.where: skill1[0]: passive → allies, buff casterAtkPct 14.08 (no duration = constant)
skill1.note: casterAtkPct correctly encodes 'of the skill user's ATK'. Passive trigger = constant uptime. Recon corroborates: effectiveAtk 134,645 = 118,027 × 1.1408.

skill2.note: Kit-literal 'when entering Full Burst'. Note explicitly corrects prior baseline's burstCast trigger to fullBurstEnter.

skill2.kitLine: Affects all allies. Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 5 round(s) for 10 sec
skill2.note: Scope narrowed from all-allies to self-only (caveat ⚑2). 55.56 = 5/9 exact for noir's 9-round base; a flat +5 on a high-ammo ally is NOT +55.56%. Engine lacks flat per-unit ammo path. Teammates' +5 rounds unmodeled.
Fraction refills each ally's own mag — per-unit-faithful. All-allies scope correctly modeled here (unlike max ammo).

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 351.64% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage
burst.note: Burst-cast damage auto-snapshots pre-FB / FB-exempt in-engine. noFb NOT set (prior 2 removed). Value matches L10 datamine (351.64).

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies with a Shotgun. Hit Rate ▲ 13.93% for 10 sec
burst.where: burst[1]: burstCast → alliesOfWeapon SG, buff hitRatePct 13.93, 10s
burst.note: alliesOfWeapon SG target supersedes baseline's self-only compromise. hitRatePct is INERT in the engine (per types.ts) — magnitude unmeasured (⚑3).

burst.kitLine: Damage to Interruption Parts ▲ 23.23% for 10 sec
burst.where: burst[1]: buff partsDamagePct 23.23, 10s (same block, alliesOfWeapon SG)
burst.note: Inert vs the partless boss at scope lock. Kept for fidelity.

burst.kitLine: Activates with an ally from the same squad still on the battlefield
burst.where: note + caveat (⚑4, NOT in unmodeled array)
burst.note: Engine has no squad gate; block 3 modeled un-gated. Gate FALSE in any team without Blanc. Documented in note + caveat but absent from formal unmodeled[] array. Effects are inert anyway (hitRatePct inert, partsDamagePct inert vs partless boss).

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Hit Rate ▲ 11.61% for 30 sec
burst.note: Modeled un-gated (⚑4). hitRatePct inert in engine. Magnitude unmeasured (⚑3).

burst.kitLine: Damage to Interruption Parts ▲ 19.36% for 30 sec
burst.note: Inert vs partless boss. Kept for fidelity per HARD RULES 2-4.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Max Ammo +5 rounds is ALL-allies in-kit; modeled self-only as maxAmmoPct 55.56 (engine has no flat per-unit ammo) — teammates' +5 rounds unmodeled (⚑2)
documentedConfounds.why: In comp, SG allies (e.g. 9-round base) get +5 rounds = +55% mag for 10s of FB — real DPS lift for every SG teammate that the sim omits. Directly under-models team damage during FB windows.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Hit Rate ▲ (13.93% SG-allies /10s, 11.61% allies /30s) modeled as hitRatePct — currently inert in the engine; magnitude unmeasured (⚑3)
documentedConfounds.why: Recon shows near-all-pellet landing on the large boss already, so marginal in-FB hit-rate gain is likely small. Engine-inert stat — no sim impact today. Could matter on small/evasive bosses out of scope.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the 11.61%/19.36% block requires a same-squad ally (Blanc) on the battlefield — engine has no squad gate, modeled un-gated (effects inert vs the partless boss) (⚑4)
documentedConfounds.why: Both stats (hitRatePct, partsDamagePct) are engine-inert, so the missing gate has zero sim impact. Would only matter if those stats gain engine support AND a non-Blanc team is simulated.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE: pullsPerSec ~1.5 / reloadFrames 62 / rolling-reload — datamine shipped; recon MEASURED cadence is the trustworthy read; minor tension on reload (62f ≈ 1.03s vs recon 0.6-0.9s)
documentedConfounds.why: LOW priority per note. Cadence is engine-owned (SG class defaults). Minor reload tension unlikely to shift damage materially at 180s.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑5 MULTI-PROJECTILE (10 pellets): split-vs-merge is engine-owned (SG landing bands) — noir IS the anchor those bands are calibrated to; no override lever
documentedConfounds.why: Engine-side concern, not an override gap. Noir's recon calibrates the landing table, so this is the reference point, not a source of error.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 HP>70% activation gate assumed always-satisfied at scope lock — not encoded, documented in note only (not in unmodeled array)
documentedConfounds.why: At scope lock (no incoming damage modeled), HP stays at 100%. Gate is trivially satisfied. Would only matter if boss-damage / HP-drain mechanics enter scope.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE banner: entire override is HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model. Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: The override has never been hand-tuned or validated against measured fight data. The HOT board reading (1.119, n=2) is consistent with un-tuned comp-side over-model noted in ks-extracts findings.

authorIntentSummary: The override is an explicitly-labeled PARSER BASELINE (hypothesis, not validated): a kit-faithful reconstruction derived from kit text and merged with a reviewed staging baseline. S1 is a passive team ATK buff (casterAtkPct 14.08) with the HP>70% gate assumed always-on at scope lock. S2 fires on fullBurstEnter, modeling +5 rounds self-only as maxAmmoPct 55.56 (engine lacks flat per-unit ammo; ally scope is the primary known gap ⚑2) and 39.88% instant reload to all allies. Burst encodes 351.64% flat damage, SG-allied hit-rate/parts buffs (both engine-inert), and an un-gated same-squad block (inert). The author kept every kit line as a block (unmodeled arrays are empty) and flagged all approximations with ⚑ markers. The unit is HOT at 1.119 (n=2) with residual comp-side over-model attributed to SG landing being solo-calibrated; the override itself is strictly kit-faithful with all magnitude levers living engine-side.
